name: move_to_coordinate
description: Move to a target x/z coordinate using pathfinder
parameters: z.object({ x: z.number().describe("Target X coordinate to move towards"), z: z.number().describe("Target Z coordinate to move towards"), radiusBlocks: z.number().min(0).default(1).describe("The allowable distance from the target coordinates to consider the task complete"), timeoutMs: z.number().int().min(1000).max(120000).default(45000).describe("Maximum active milliseconds to spend moving before giving up") })

name: scout_randomly
description: Move in a random direction for scouting items and threats, then regroup with teammate
parameters: z.object({ teammateName: z.string().describe("Name of the teammate to regroup with after scouting, e.g., 'Bot2'"), maxDistanceBlocks: z.number().int().min(1).max(100).default(20).describe("Approximate distance to move away in a random direction"), maxDurationMs: z.number().int().min(1000).max(60000).default(3000).describe("Active time in milliseconds to spend moving away before regrouping"), scanRadiusBlocks: z.number().int().min(1).max(50).default(10).describe("Observation radius during the scouting movement"), regroupRadiusBlocks: z.number().int().min(1).max(10).default(3).describe("Target distance to maintain when meeting back up with the teammate") })
code: const targetName = args.teammateName; const pollMs = 100; if (!bot.entity || bot.health <= 0) return '<UNSAFE>: Bot is not alive.'; if (!bot.players[targetName]) return '<NO TARGET>: Teammate ' + targetName + ' not found in player list.'; startBackgroundSkill(bot, 'scout_randomly', async function (token) { const movements = new Movements(bot); movements.canDig = false; bot.pathfinder.setMovements(movements); const startPos = bot.entity.position.clone(); try { if (!await waitUntilWorldActive(bot, token, pollMs)) return; const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2; const dest = startPos.offset(Math.cos(angle) * args.maxDistanceBlocks, 0, Math.sin(angle) * args.maxDistanceBlocks); bot.pathfinder.setGoal(new goals.GoalNear(dest.x, dest.y, dest.z, 2)); await waitForActiveMs(bot, token, args.maxDurationMs, pollMs); while (canContinueBotAction(bot, token)) { const teammate = bot.players[targetName]?.entity; if (teammate) { if (bot.entity.position.distanceTo(teammate.position) <= args.regroupRadiusBlocks) break; bot.pathfinder.setGoal(new goals.GoalFollow(teammate, args.regroupRadiusBlocks)); } else if (bot.players[targetName]) { const lastKnown = bot.players[targetName].entity?.position; if (lastKnown) bot.pathfinder.setGoal(new goals.GoalNear(lastKnown.x, lastKnown.y, lastKnown.z, args.regroupRadiusBlocks)); } else { break; } if (!await waitForActiveMs(bot, token, 1000, pollMs)) break; } } finally { bot.pathfinder.setGoal(null); bot.pathfinder.stop(); } }); return '<STARTED>: Scouting for ' + args.maxDurationMs + 'ms then regrouping with ' + targetName + '.';
